title: The Ultimate Mod
description: this is the ULTIMATE mod in Minecraft's history >:)
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822ba6c632e4cc2f40ed6e7af32761882cd985ee.png)

# **What this mod about ?**

This mod is all about adding **cursed** and **absurd** content that’ll make you question reality, laugh out loud, and maybe even cry a little — all while keeping things fun and (eventually) balanced.
Right now, it's the early mod phase. So yeah… there are weapons that one-shot everything and armor that makes you practically immortal.
**BUT DON'T WORRY**. Balance is coming. More content is coming. Trust me — this is just the beginning.

## **Content ?**

It’s a small (but powerful) batch of cursed items for now. Here's what you’ll find:

- 🧱 Nokia-themed Items, Tools, Armor, and even a Block
- 🟢 Emerald Armor and Tools
- 🪵 Stick Sword
- 🧱 The Backrooms Block (for literally no reason)
- 💿 The Cool Disk, which plays a surprisingly banger track 👀
- 🐷 New mob called **Crig** and a fake pig called **pIg** (bugs expected)
- 🪨 The **BLOCK OF ROCK**
- 🦞 **Blue Lobster**

More's coming real soon. This is just the appetizer 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## **Whats Next ?**

Coming soon to a nightmare near you:

- 🌞 Sun-Stone and other bizarre ores
- 💀 New mobs, biomes, and boss fights
- 🤡 And of course — more unhinged weapons and equipment

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I’m also planning to move from MCreator to manual coding as the mod grows, to make balancing and advanced features easier.
That said, I’ll still drop experimental MCreator builds under “Beta” — think of them as cursed little teasers for what’s coming.

</details>
